message:
🐛 Use unique branch names for mission generation PRs (#9)

Branch name now includes HH:MM:SS to prevent collisions on same-day re-runs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -148,7 +148,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          BRANCH="cncf-gen-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
+          BRANCH="cncf-gen-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
           git checkout -b "$BRANCH"
           git add solutions/cncf-generated/
           # Commit search state if present (tracks processed items)
